title: 3 Global Infrastructure Stocks Set to Benefit from Economic Recovery
text: Although we constantly receive conflicting messaging, we continue to be in the midst of a global economic recovery. That recovery translates to an opportunity for infrastructure stocks as building ramps up.

title: HDELY vs. VMC: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors interested in Building Products - Concrete and Aggregates stocks are likely familiar with HeidelbergCement AG (HDELY) and Vulcan Materials (VMC). But which of these two stocks offers value investors a better bang for their buck right now?

title: Concrete & Aggregates Industry Holds Promise: 4 Stocks to Watch
text: Federal infrastructure spending should help the Zacks Building Products - Concrete & Aggregates industry players to thrive. VMC, MLM, EXP and SUM should gain from a demand surge amid high costs.

title: 10 Biggest Basic Materials Stocks With High Debt-to-Equity Ratios
text: The Basic Materials sector includes companies that deal in the discovery, development, and processing of raw materials.

title: VULCAN ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2023 CONFERENCE CALL
text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , April 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Vulcan Materials Company (NYSE: VMC) will host its first quarter 2023 earnings conference call on Thursday, May 4 at 10:00 a.m.
